from source import find_in_sorted

def test_find_in_sorted_target_not_in_upper_half():
    """Verify binary search doesn't infinite loop when target is in upper half but not in array."""
    result = find_in_sorted([1, 4], 5)
    assert result == -1, "Should return -1 when target not in array"
